description: Minimalist notes CLI in TypeScript. Serves as a didactic example of Harness Engineering.

features.name: project_architecture_analysis
features.title: project architecture analysis
features.description: Analyze the current project structure and output in the ARCHITECTURE.md file
acceptance: The ARCHITECTURE.md file should be updated or created
The file should include all the relevant details about project architecture
The file should provide useful information to consult when applying changes in the project

features.name: add_bcrypt_backend
features.title: Add bcrypt backend
features.description: The bcrypt library has been deleted from the client project in /Documentos/euro-frontend. Now add bcrypt dependency and usage in the backend project
acceptance: The project should not have any build errors
All the hash logic should be moved to this project to keep the logic working
All the endpoints that use hash logic should be updated
The backend should handle the hash logic
The backend should now return the proper response to the client
